flows.name: Standard Repair Process

steps.action: Receive customer and vehicle, collect problem description and contact info
Perform initial diagnostic and prepare repair estimate
Present estimate to customer and obtain approval or rejection
Review and approve estimates exceeding $500 (escalated from step 3)
Execute approved repairs and perform quality check
Process payment and return vehicle to customer

dependencies: Customer approval required before step 5 (mechanic cannot begin without it)
Owner approval required for estimates exceeding $500 (step 4 before step 5)
Parts must be available before step 5 can begin

flows.name: Diagnostic-Only Process

steps.action: Receive customer and explain diagnostic fee policy
Perform comprehensive diagnostic and document findings
Present diagnostic results and repair recommendations to customer
outputs: Customer decision on which repairs to approve

dependencies: Diagnostic fee is waived if customer approves any recommended repair
Customer can choose to take vehicle elsewhere after receiving diagnostic report
